title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: The open creative AI workspace

title: 91zgaoge/StoryMoss
summary: 🌿 StoryMoss (草苔) — AI导演式小说创作系统。Tauri+Rust驱动的桌面写作软件，集成知识图谱、伏笔追踪、StyleDNA风格引擎、协同编辑、7阶段全自动创作工作流。让AI成为你的创作搭档，越写越懂你。

title: lidge-jun/opencodex
summary: Universal provider proxy for OpenAI Codex & Claude Code — use any LLM (Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Ollama…) with Codex CLI, App, SDK, and Claude Code

title: theiskaa/hedos
summary: Run and serve local models headlessly

title: cdamken/chati
summary: Ollama-centric CLI chat for macOS: one-command installer, RAM-aware model pick, OpenWebUI + SearXNG, all local.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: An AI you live with, not one you visit. A little bluebird settles into your computer — keeps your unfinished threads, learns your rhythms, and gets better at helping the longer you're together. Local-first: your life stays on your machine.

title: lachydotmcg/metis-orchestrator
summary: Local-first AI orchestration studio. Route every task to the best-suited model, local or cloud. BYO keys or OpenRouter, free.

title: scian0204/AnywhereLLM
summary: Use an LLM in any focused text field on macOS via a global hotkey — without stealing focus

title: patil-shubham-dev/AgenticOS
summary: An open-source, self-hostable AI operating system and development workspace. Powered by Electron and React 19, it features multi-agent orchestration, full Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, native filesystem access, and an extensible tool ecosystem for autonomous software development.

title: tonkonozhenko-mi/ai_private_workspace
summary: Local-first desktop app (macOS & Windows) to chat with your own projects — offline RAG over your files, grounded answers with sources. No cloud, no accounts.

title: strands-compose/sdk-python
summary: Zero-code YAML-driven agent orchestration over strands-agents

title: ShotsMan2/chatbot-project
summary: An AI-powered e-commerce sales assistant built with Next.js, local RAG architecture, and Ollama.

title: zlatko-lakisic/My-Futuristic-Home
summary: A real smart home built like production infrastructure. Local-first, AI-powered, fully self-hosted: Home Assistant, Frigate, edge LLMs, agentic irrigation, and a 9U rack that runs the house.

title: ManifoldKit/ManifoldKit
summary: Reusable SwiftUI chat framework for local and cloud LLM inference on Apple platforms

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: ENTERPILOT/GoModel
summary: AI gateway written in Go. Lightweight unified OpenAI-compatible API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, xAI & Ollama. LiteLLM alternative with observability, guardrails, streaming, costs and usage tracking.

title: bayonsa/Leadroom
summary: Local-first lead discovery and enrichment workspace with hybrid web/OSM search, deep crawling, Ollama-powered extraction, a deduplicated repository, and human-reviewed outreach.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: Labeeb2339/cyber-rag
summary: Fully local cybersecurity RAG with hybrid retrieval, ATT&CK graph grounding, citations, and a measured evaluation harness.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.
